exam_structure.negative_marking: Yes - 25% of marks assigned to the question

exams.eligibility: Approved users and sales personnel of Trading Members of Currency Derivatives segments of recognized stock exchanges. Also open to interested students/professionals and any other individuals.

subtopics: Basics of Currency Markets in India
Impact of Economic Factors on Currency Prices

syllabus_topics.topic: Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management in Currency Futures
Codes of Conduct and Investor Protection Measures

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program of one day duration (approximately six hours) with test at end; new certificate for 3 years

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-II-A: Registrars to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents - Corporate Certification Examination
exams.eligibility: Associated persons employed or engaged by Registrars to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents for performing corporate R&T functions for listed companies, including: dealing/interacting with investors or issuers, collecting/processing applications, handling corporate actions, refunds, redemptions, repurchase of securities, etc.

syllabus_topics.topic: Securities Basics - Equity and Debt Securities
Issuance of Duplicate Certificates for Securities
Stock Exchange Regulations and SEBI LODR Guidelines
Service Standards, FTR Principles and Ethical Conduct
RTAs, Sponsor Banks, Bankers to the Issue, UPI System

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program for revalidation; certificate valid for 3 years

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-II-B: Registrars to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents - Mutual Fund Certification Examination
exams.eligibility: Associated persons employed or engaged by Registrars to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents for performing mutual fund R&T functions, including: dealing/interacting with investors or issuers, collecting/processing applications, handling corporate actions, refunds, redemptions, and other compliance activities under SEBI (Registrars to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents) Regulations, 1993.

syllabus_topics.topic: Role of RTAs in Mutual Fund Issuances and Transactions
Regulatory Environment for RTAs in India
Risk Controls in Mutual Fund R&T Operations

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program for revalidation; certificate valid for 3 years

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-III-A: Securities Intermediaries Compliance (Non-Fund) Certification Examination

exam_structure.negative_marking: Yes - 25% of marks assigned to the question

exams.eligibility: Compliance officers and other persons engaged in compliance function with any intermediary registered as: Stock Brokers, Sub-brokers, Depository Participants, Merchant Bankers, Underwriters, Bankers to the Issue, Debenture Trustees, and Credit Rating Agencies.

part_a.title: Understanding the Financial and Regulatory Structure in India

units.topic: SEBI (Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices) Regulations, 2003
The Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program for revalidation; certificate valid for 3 years

exam_structure.negative_marking: Yes - 25% of marks assigned to the question

exams.eligibility: All associated persons working as compliance officers in listed companies.

syllabus_topics.topic: Capital Market Structure in India and Role of Capital Market
Role and Responsibilities of a Compliance Officer of a Listed Company
Avenues for Raising Funds from Indian and Global Markets
SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations (ICDR)
SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations (LODR)
Day-to-Day Compliance Requirements for Public Companies

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-IV: Interest Rate Derivatives Certification Examination

exam_structure.negative_marking: Yes - 25% of marks assigned to the question

exams.eligibility: Approved users and sales personnel of Trading Members registered in the Currency Derivatives Segment of a recognized stock exchange trading in Interest Rate Derivatives. Also open to interested students/professionals and any other individuals.

syllabus_topics.topic: Introduction to Interest Rate, Interest Rate Instruments and Fixed Income Market
subtopics: Spot rate and holding period return
Cash flow, yield and price of bonds
Risk measures: Macaulay Duration, Modified Duration, Rupee Duration, PVBP, Convexity

syllabus_topics.topic: Strategic Applications of Interest Rate Derivatives

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program for revalidation; certificate valid for 3 years

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-V-A: Mutual Fund Distributors Certification Examination
exams.eligibility: Associated persons including distributors, agents, brokers, sub-brokers employed or engaged in sale/distribution of mutual fund products. Must be at least 18 years old. Also open to students and professionals interested in mutual fund/wealth management careers.

syllabus_topics.topic: Concept and Role of a Mutual Fund
Fund Distribution and Channel Management Practices

subtopics: Computation of Net Assets and NAV
Entry/Exit Load and impact on NAV

syllabus_topics.topic: Return, Risk and Performance of Funds
Selecting the Right Investment Products for Investors

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program for revalidation; certificate valid for 3 years

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-V-B: Mutual Fund Foundation Certification Examination
exams.eligibility: Designed for a new cadre of distributors including: postal agents, retired government/semi-government officials (class III and above with 10+ years service), retired teachers (10+ years service), retired bank officers (10+ years service), bank correspondents, and other persons as notified by AMFI/AMC. No specific educational qualification or age requirement set by NISM.

syllabus_topics.topic: Concept and Role of a Mutual Fund
subtopics: Growth of the mutual fund industry in India
Structure of Mutual Funds in India

syllabus_topics.topic: Offer Document / Mutual Fund Products for New Cadre of Distributors
Selecting the Right Investment Products for Investors

exams.certificate_renewal: CPE Program for revalidation; certificate valid for 3 years

exams.full_name: NISM-Series-V-C: Mutual Fund Distributors (Level 2) Certification Examination

exam_structure.question_breakdown: 50 questions of 1 mark each + 25 questions of 2 marks each (including caselets)
exam_structure.negative_marking: Yes - 25% of marks assigned to the question

exams.eligibility: Mutual fund distributors and agents, persons employed/engaged in sale/distribution of mutual fund products, students interested in advanced mutual fund knowledge. This was a voluntary examination open to all.

subtopics: Historical Returns and Risk in Equity, Debt, Gold
Equity Investment Management Strategies (Fundamental, Technical, Quantitative Analysis)
Smart Beta Strategies, Leveraged Beta, Fundamental Indexing
Computation of Net Assets and NAV
Qualitative and Quantitative Methods for Performance Evaluation
Reading Scheme Documents and Fact Sheets
SIP in ELSS and Lock-in Provisions
